summary: Iteration 8: Complete testing of Islamic prayer app major overhaul. Backend 22/22 tests PASSED. Frontend 5-tab navigation, Sohba social platform with REAL backend APIs, More page with profile/tools/settings, Messages page with notifications - all verified working.

minor.issue: 403 error in console logs - external API issue, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: All features working correctly as per requirements
Bottom nav has correct 5 tabs: الرئيسية, الصلاة, صُحبة, الرسائل, المزيد (NOT حسابي) ✅
GET /api/sohba/posts returns REAL posts from MongoDB (not mocked) ✅
POST /api/sohba/posts creates real post with auth ✅
POST /api/sohba/posts/{id}/comments creates real comment with auth ✅
GET /api/sohba/my-stats returns user stats with auth ✅
DELETE /api/sohba/posts/{id} deletes post with proper authorization ✅
Frontend Sohba page shows real posts from backend with category tabs ✅
Frontend create post sheet opens with 10 category selection buttons ✅
Frontend More page has tools grid (8 tools: القبلة, التسبيح, الصلاة, القرآن, الأدعية, الرقية, الزكاة, المتابعة) ✅
Frontend More page settings section with theme toggle ✅
Frontend More page athan selector with Makkah/Madinah options ✅
Frontend More page shows user profile with stats when logged in ✅
Admin shield icon visible in More page for admin user ✅
seed_data_creation: Multiple test posts created during testing with TEST_ prefix - cleaned up by delete tests. Real posts (6+) exist in MongoDB from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sohba social features now use REAL backend APIs (MongoDB). Posts/likes/comments/saves/follows all persist in DB. Messages notifications are still LOCAL system notifications (MOCKED). PermissionManager overlay appears on first load - dismiss with data-testid='permission-skip-location' or 'permission-dismiss-btn'. Translation API 403 error is external Google issue, non-blocking.
mocked_apis_note: Messages notifications are LOCAL/MOCKED (system messages only). All Sohba social features are REAL with MongoDB persistence.

frontend_ui.sohba_page: ✅ Shows real posts from backend, category tabs, create FAB
frontend_ui.sohba_post_interactions: ✅ Like, comment, save buttons with data-testid
frontend_ui.sohba_create_post: ✅ Sheet opens, 10 categories, content input, submit works
frontend_ui.more_page_guest: ✅ Login prompt, tools grid, athan selector, theme toggle
frontend_ui.more_page_logged_in: ✅ User profile with stats, admin shield icon, logout button
